title: NTV broadcasting various NGE Episodes
wikitext:
[]: NTV broadcasting various NGE Episodes             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 22, 2012 9:41 pm http://extr.b-ch.com/cgi-bin/eva_news/official/news_det.cgi?news_c=11245 Nihon TV will be broadcasting various episodes, probably to get hype about NME films on TV. On November 5th will be: Episodes 01, 02, 05, and 06. (To give an Eva 1.0 Operation Yashima feel apparently?) Then Episode 08 will air on November 6th then Episode 09 on November 7th. No idea about the rest of the series but I'd assume more episodes would air.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Mon Oct 22, 2012 11:21 pm It's an interesting way to advertise. Though it's doubtful that they'll show the rest of the episode considering that the broadcast to this point stop at Shinji and Asuka's team fight. though I'm probably wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Oct 23, 2012 9:13 am Tangentially related question: are they going to stream the whole series on Nicovideo instead?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Oct 26, 2012 8:18 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Tangentially related question: are they going to stream the whole series on Nicovideo instead?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Oct 26, 2012 9:21 am This is the last update on Minna no Eva, apparently NicoNico going to stream the whole series in block of 3 episodes per time plus Jo and Ha TV version. It looks like they won't stream Death and EoE though, but who cares them anyway?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Oct 26, 2012 9:27 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: This is the last update on Minna no Eva, apparently NicoNico going to stream the whole series in block of 3 episodes per time plus Jo and Ha TV version.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Oct 26, 2012 9:30 am Unfortunately, I completely forgot about it. Even though I have to say that it would have been really hard to follow (at least for me) if it was congested like that live event where they showed the trailer of Q.
